#  Search and Filter for Change Events (Android) 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Read Only' level permissions or higher on the project's Change Events tool.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the **Change Events** tool using the Procore app on an Android mobile device.


#### Search for a Change Event
  1. Tap the **Search** ![Icon Search](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/0e1287800ad9e8908deec3df3b65ebd0/c5fc5af3e51b77953edf62739fba7b2c/icon-search.png?fm=webp&h=15) icon to enter in a keyword or phrase matching the desired change event.  
  
![Change Events Android Search Change Events](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/6dd113e319a7c32b625a8fdf4b85a670/302c37f198db83d702b6b2f193b81c04/change-events-android-search-change-events.png?fm=webp)  

  2. Tap a change event to view its details.


#### Filter Change Events
  1. Tap the **Filter** ![Icon Filter2](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/1e4b3ef496246c619285ebd3477db671/a7c3fd9c50cac8afbb81c1e492657fb8/icon-filter2.png?fm=webp&h=17) icon.   
  
![Change Events Android Filter Change Events](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/6e765f8db44ef6aae4c00a216b2946cc/48c8c5f3995f884d85968de3522035ca/change-events-android-filter-change-events.png?fm=webp)  

  2. Tap a status to only view change events with that status.
  3. Tap **Apply**.
  4. _Optional:_ To reset the filter that you applied, tap the **Filter** ![Icon Filter2](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/1e4b3ef496246c619285ebd3477db671/a7c3fd9c50cac8afbb81c1e492657fb8/icon-filter2.png?fm=webp&h=17) icon again and then tap **Reset**.


## See Also
  * [Change Events (Android) - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/change-events-android/permissions)
  * [Create a Change Event (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/change-events-android/tutorials/create-a-change-event-android)
  * [Which Procore tools can I use to create a change event?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-which-procore-tools-can-i-use-to-create-a-change-event)
title: Search and Filter for Change Events (Android)
description: How to search and filter for change events using the Procore app on an Android mobile device.
